script_metadata.description: A dramatic 5-scene story with multiple characters

scenes.text: In a world consumed by darkness, only one warrior dared to stand against the tide of evil. This is his story.
I have trained my entire life for this moment. No matter what stands before me, I will protect the innocent and defeat the forces of darkness!
You foolish child. You think your courage means anything here? This kingdom belongs to me now. Surrender, or face your destruction.
Hero, our people believe in you. The ancient prophecy speaks of a warrior with a heart of gold. Today, you fulfill that destiny. Fight well.
Wow! Did you see that? He actually did it! The hero won! Now everyone is safe and we can go home. I knew he would win, I just knew it!
